title: The Problem Solvers: Michele Catasta at Replit
summary: Michele Catasta built Replit to democratize software development through agentic AI, enabling 40 million users to code in natural language without prior experience. Replit partnered with Anthropic's Claude in early 2024 for coding capabilities and maintains a tight integration cycle with Anthropic's research previews.
